rationale: Keeper tied to sacred flame, ritual communion, and protective support role. Converted as a level 5 Conduit with a Sun-aligned seed.
Soldier-king, siege commander, and morale anchor. Converted as a level 7 Tactician using his current NPC level as the baseline.
Informant, finder, and networked operator. Converted as a level 4 Shadow leaning on the existing shadow keyword in the actor file.
Former Chainwarden sergeant leading civilians under pressure. Converted as a level 4 Tactician with an insurgent-flavored tactical build.
Zealous inquisitor with strong religious and punitive framing. Converted as a level 5 Censor.
Djupdvergr (deep-dwarf) scout and wilderness guide. Compact, economical, and stealthy — a natural Shadow with Weald Stalker roots.
Young Ember Keeper whose flame went dark. Earnest, protective, guilt-driven — a level 1 Conduit with sacred fire support identity.
Former trade-caravan warden who turned logistics instinct into refugee leadership. Level 3 Tactician — practical, decisive, battle-hardened.
Chainwarden Warden-Sergeant at a fortified checkpoint. Exhausted system cog, not a villain. Level 2 Tactician with military warden framing.
Elder leading 43 survivors in a secret steam oasis through strict protocols and the Oath of Silence. Level 2 Conduit — community protector, keeper of the hidden flame.
Ash-Walker druid who moves through old growth and watches root-lore against winter blight. Tonttu (wode elf) ancestry fits. Elementalist (Earth) for nature-druid expression.
Dwarf innkeeper — the warm, practical heart of Stairwatch. No-nonsense, generous when earned. Level 1 Troubadour captures her social warmth and community anchor role.
140-year-old Djupdvergr Forgemaster whose forge still burns through sheer stubbornness. Maker career is perfect. Level 5 Elementalist (Earth) for forge and deep-earth mastery.
Caravan master who reads people like maps and carries a glowing sealed clay pot — ancient flame connection mixed with social acuity. Level 2 Troubadour with Outrider framing.
Woodcutter-turned-charcoal-burner who refused to leave the Ashen Woods. Three years alone, stubborn and physical. Level 1 Fury with Weald Stalker roots — hardened loner who keeps burning.
Frightened teenage Ember-Keeper of Stairwatch — in the role only six months but deeply dutiful. Level 1 Conduit. Lantern Runner career fits the flame-keeper role perfectly.
Jarl of Rindgate — eight months protecting 300 people with nowhere else to go. Weathered, practical, tired. Level 3 Tactician with Freeholder roots — community-first leadership.

Pale Maw Strike Leader — battle-worn, grief-hardened, absolute religious conviction. Takes command without hesitation and prosecutes assaults with cold efficiency. Level 4 Censor — the zealot mirror to Thrinn Ashward.
